message:
refactor(session): simplify ForkPlan destructuring at fork callsites

Replace full ForkPlan { entries, leaf_id, selected_text } destructuring
with direct field access (fork_plan.selected_text.clone()) in both rpc.rs
and interactive/tree.rs. The entries and leaf_id fields are now consumed
directly by the forking method rather than being extracted at the callsite,
reducing unnecessary variable bindings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
